text.title: Pair with AI Agent Protocol Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the pair-with-ai-agent-protocol methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: write-intent
step.action: Author writes a one-sentence intent + names ≥1 acceptance test (file::test).
step.decision-gate: If acceptance test does not exist yet, write it first.

step.name: agent-plan
step.action: Agent (opus) proposes file list + change outline + commands.
step.decision-gate: Human ratifies or rejects; rejected plans get rewritten.

step.name: human-review-diff
step.action: Human reads diff; flags out-of-scope edits.
step.decision-gate: If out-of-scope edits exist, revert them or close session.

step.name: agent-commit
step.action: Agent runs tests, then commits with the intent as message subject.

step.name: attach-transcript
step.action: Author links the transcript in the PR body and records models_used.
